ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product based on customer reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the product brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the customer review */,
  "overall_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating given by the reviewer */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the review */,
  "unix_review_time" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of when the review was submitted */,
  "review_time" TEXT /* Human-readable timestamp of when the review was submitted */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the reviewer purchased the product */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the reviewer is verified */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the reviewer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the reviewer registered on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "helpful_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each helpful vote record */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review */,
  "num_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating the review was helpful */,
  "num_total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_helpful_votes_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the review (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_sentiments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended product */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., collaborative filtering, content-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_review_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the user wrote the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_review_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_review_history_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)
